headline: Hardware Attestation Gathers Power to Gatekeep the Web
lede: Security is being weaponized to enforce a restrictive duopoly on personal devices. By tying web access to specific hardware manufacturers, platforms are effectively stripping users of their digital autonomy.

headline: Why Developers Should Move AI Inference to the Edge
lede: The reliance on external cloud APIs introduces avoidable privacy risks and network dependencies. Modern mobile silicon provides enough overhead to handle intelligence tasks entirely on the device.

headline: The Perils of AI-Driven Architectural Decay
lede: Speedy AI coding assistants often encourage a path of least resistance, resulting in unmaintainable systems. Human oversight remains the only reliable safeguard against the accumulation of structural debt.
pullquote: Human developers must provide the structural constraints to prevent systems from collapsing under their own complexity.

headline: James Burke and the Art of the Perfect Broadcast
lede: The 1978 series Connections remains a masterclass in intellectual ambition and technical precision. A singular, choreographed shot serves as a testament to the era's dedication to documentary excellence.

headline: Running Large Language Models on 24GB Unified Memory
lede: High-performance inference is no longer the sole domain of centralized data centers. With careful configuration, consumer hardware can handle local tasks while maintaining full data privacy.

headline: Tuning Guitars Through Smartphone Accelerometers
lede: A clever proof-of-concept uses inertial measurement units to detect string vibrations. It transforms a standard motion sensor into a unique, if experimental, musical tool.

headline: Obsidian Plugin Ecosystem Targeted by New Remote Access Trojan
lede: A sophisticated social engineering campaign has turned a popular note-taking tool into a vector for malware. Attackers are exploiting community plugins to bypass traditional security perimeters.

headline: Ratty Brings GPU-Accelerated 3D Graphics to the Terminal
lede: Shell interfaces are evolving beyond simple text streams. This project integrates 3D rendering to expand the visual functionality of standard command-line workflows.

headline: Sustainable Productivity and the Cost of Maintenance
lede: O Every line of code written carries a permanent tax of future maintenance. If AI tools accelerate feature delivery without reducing long-term upkeep, they ultimately erode the viability of the codebase.

headline: Reflecting on the Cascading Failures of CVE-2024-YIKES
lede: A fictionalized supply-chain breach exposes the fragility of modern dependency management. Millions of systems remain vulnerable until a serendipitous update finally mitigates the threat.
